programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tells the Clampetts that he is building a city on the location where Jed's movie studio is located. The Clampetts mistake a western prop town for the city.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to run the store on the empty studio Western set but can't understand why they don't have any customers.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed gets an honorary doctorate when he donates money to the college that Mr. Drysdale attended. Now the family thinks he can now practice medicine, which doesn't sit well with Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she can get the hillbillies to move out by throwing herself at Jed. Meanwhile Granny is itching to fight her because she fell into the cement pond when Jed had to stop a fight between them earlier.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An old friend from back in the hills is now an Elvis like singing idol. The Clampetts misunderstand the situation and decide to help Johnny get on his feet.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Johnny Poke's mother arrives from the Ozarks and Granny's matchmaking begins. Jed and Emma Poke come up with a plan to discourage her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale needs Jed to donate $190,000 to save the Beverly Hills Ballet but he has his hands full trying to keep Granny from heading back to the hills pushing all her stuff in a wheelbarrow.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the butler into staying on, posing as a boarder, so that he can teach the Clampetts how to be more civilized.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts still don't realize that Mr. Pinckney is their butler instead of their boarder. When he tries to leave them Granny thinks he trying to skip without paying his rent.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Hospitalized for nerves from dealing with the hillbillies Mrs. Drysdale threatens Mr. Drysdale to stay there until he gets rid of them and even sending for a specialist. Unfortunately, the Clampet clan is on their way to visit her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital. The Clampetts, unhappy with what they feel as the hospital's poor level of care, break her out and set her up in their mansion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May goes to Jed's studio to be in a movie and meet a potential husband.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Ellie May loses another suitor to Miss Jane in another case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts accidentally run into a beatnik he moves into the Clampett mansion, but neither he nor they know what to make of each other.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: As a favor to Jed Mr. Drysdale arranges for a playboy bank director (who normally only dates women half his age) to come court Granny, while Jed goes out with a beautiful woman who dates rich older men.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants Jed to find a wife and asks for Mr. Drysdale's help. He introduces Jed to Phyllis but learns too late she a gold digger and becomes alarmed when they head to the track. But it's Granny they need to worry about.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to become a "double naught" spy and converts the family's truck into his idea of a Bondmobile. But he becomes the unwitting pawn in another banker's scheme.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's biggest rival John Cushing succeeds in getting the Clampetts to transfer all of their money to his bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drydale's poodle Claude is to enter a dog show but gets sick right before. Granny offers to doctor the dog but Ellie Mae is concerned he doesn't know any tricks so she decides to help out with one of her own pets.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: John Brewster, the oilman from Tulsa, is bringing his new bride to California for their honeymoon. Somehow the Clampetts get the idea that their backyard rustic cabin is the ideal place for the Brewsters to stay.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: With the arrival of spring, the Countess returns for Granny's new batch of spring tonic. Granny thinks she's looking for a new husband and that Jed is her perfect match.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale owns a building that houses a beatnik's club. He hopes to get rid of them when they can't pay their rent but they find a new a sponsor: Jed Clampett.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed soon regrets helping out the beatniks with their money problems when Jethro, Elly May (and even Granny!) decide to join them.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is appalled to learn that Jed is going door-to-door peddling his services as a handyman. But then he's apoplectic when he discovers that Jed has been hired by a rival bank.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A long time employee of the Commerce Bank is being forcibly retired to make way for a new computer system. A chance meeting with the Clampetts gives him an idea about dealing with Mr. Drysdale.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Beauregard Short arrives in Beverly Hills from back home. Everyone assumes he's looking for a wife and Jethro decides to show him how to be like him, an international playboy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Brewster, the oil man who made Jed a multi-millionaire, arrives in Beverly Hills with his wife planning to build their dream house. Jed and Granny think they have the perfect house in mind for their dream home.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dylan's generous wedding gift vexes Kelly and Matt, who consider moving to Seattle; an offer for their tabloid separates the Sanders' professionally; Noah meets Ellen's family; Donna's mother sells her house.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: David expresses his feelings for Donna by writing her a giant love note in the sand. Dylan graduates from California University. Matt considers moving to New York to help his sister-in-law raise her child.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: After 10 years, the friends of 90210 say goodbye with a wedding, a reunion, and a few surprises! Just as Donna and David are joining together, Kelly's life is falling apart. Meanwhile, Steve and Janet make some major decisions about their future.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E001) Twins Brandon and Brenda Walsh experience a very special kind of culture shock when they move from Minnesota to Beverly Hills and begin their new lives at West Beverly High.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E002) Brandon meets Dylan McKay, a brooding classmate. As they become friends, Brandon learns that Dylan's bad-boy act masks a hidden life that few people ever see.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E003) Brenda shops with Kelly and Tiffany and wishes she had their kind of money.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E004) Brandon is visited by his ex-girlfriend Sheryl but, when she meets Dylan, she's quickly star-struck by his money and glamor.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E005) When Brandon tries out for the basketball team, he's angered to learn that his main rival is from another district.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E006) An unreasonable teacher makes Brandon's life miserable by giving him no grade higher than a C.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E007) "Delusions of glamour" overcome Brenda when she meets Kelly's beautiful mother Jackie, a former model.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E008) The Walsh parents examine their relationship while Brenda and Brandon examine theirs, as they get involved in a UCLA study on twins.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E009) Sympathy and responsibility are at odds when Brenda volunteers for a teen crisis hotline.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S01E010) The chemistry between Brenda and Dylan starts to heat up when Brenda accidentally catches him in the shower, then comforts him after he fights with his father.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees kick off Ted and Nicole's anniversary party, Eva tries one last time to keep her mother in check and Kat inches closer to unearthing the conspiracy that threatens to shatter the family's big night.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Leslie's explosive revelations push the Duprees and Richardsons to their breaking points, sending the whole family scrambling to pick up the pieces.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees scramble to steady the ship in the wake of Ted's betrayal, Eva struggles to make amends, and Kat witnesses an intimate moment that could change her life.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees reel from a cascade of betrayals, Eva scrambles to hold on to what little she has left, and Kat's growing suspicion sets the stage for a reckoning that threatens to fracture the family beyond repair.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees reclaim their power with a defiant appearance at the country club, Eva makes a final plea for her mother's love, Martin begins to unravel the truth behind a haunting memory that could destroy the family's legacy.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: The Duprees rally around old dreams and new truths, Eva walks into the lion's den hoping for a second chance, Dani reignites a forbidden flame, and Kat quietly prepares for war, refusing to let Eva claim a place in the family.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Eva searches for connection on her birthday, and Kat turns the tables with a bold move that could finally bring Leslie down. Meanwhile, Ashley and Derek tiptoe around a growing divide. Is love enough to hold them together?

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Dani and Pamela chase a risky new dream, Doug finds himself out of options, Kat closes in on Leslie and Nicole contemplates a life-changing move.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Derek and Ashley reach a breaking point, Dani finally defines the line between sex and something more, Doug scrambles to cover his lies before they destroy everything, and Leslie proves she's not going down without a fight.

programme.title: Beyond the Gates
programme.desc: Anita opens the door to her past, Ashley's heartbreak threatens to undo her, and Eva leans into the one person who believes her.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Un triste adiós
programme.desc: Danny investiga las circunstancias de la desaparición de una ex oficial de la Policía de Nueva York que desaparece al día siguiente de revelarle que planeaba hacer las paces con la mujer que ella y su compañero condenaron injustamente años atrás.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Hotch recibe una llamada telefónica de su hermano Sean, de quien está separado y reside en Nueva York, de quien no ha escuchado nada durante cuatro años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS investiga cuando un honrado Marine veterano encuentra a su muerte cayendo al vacío en un hotel.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: McGee lucha para saber qué ocurrió luego de que su hermana aparezca ensangrentada y confundida frente a su puerta.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS disgustado, reúne fuerzas junto al FBI luego de identificar que los restos de un hombre hallado en una base Marine coinciden con los de un asesino serial que el Bureau viene buscando hace 12 años.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un altamente clasificado vehículo robotizado llamado Otto causa la muerte de una teniente de la Marina, Gibbs y el equipo analizan si se trata de un suicidio o un homicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amor perdido
programme.desc: Erin se enfrenta en la corte a su exesposo, Jack (Peter Hermann), quien está defendiendo al hombre que ella intenta condenar por asesinato. Mientras tanto, Danny y Baez investigan para determinar si el esposo está detrás del asesinato de su esposa.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ni rendición, ni retirada
programme.desc: Después de que Reggie Wilson (Cyrus Farmer), un testigo en un caso anterior de Erin, le pide ayuda para desmantelar una operación de drogas en su edificio de apartamentos, ella se propone hacer que el edificio sea seguro para su familia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Interferencia extranjera
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se unen con dos agentes rusos para buscar a un peligroso hombre ruso que ingresó a EE. UU. con una visa diplomática.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La delgada línea azul
programme.desc: Cuando Danny intercepta un envío de varios millones de dólares que estaba destinado a un cártel de drogas en México, se convierte en un blanco cuando ellos regresan en busca de venganza.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A defiant motorist is shocked when his mother sides with the law, and deputies discover a man wearing a bizarre costume during a routine traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An evasive driver blames his girlfriend for his behavior, a pregnant woman makes some questionable choices, and a robbery suspect finds comfort in coming clean.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect collides with another driver while fleeing from police, deputies mediate an altercation over a bag of chips, and officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspected jewelry thieves attempt a daring escape during a pursuit, a man gives officers a challenge during his arrest, and a traffic stop puts a marriage in jeopardy.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man takes off running, a woman interferes with a traffic stop involving her boyfriend, and deputies respond to a dispute between a man and his girlfriend's son.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: An elderly woman crashes her car into a crowded restaurant. One of the patrons is Sara's paramedic boyfriend. Grissom and Nick investigate the possible carbon monoxide murder of a woman in her home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Sara investigate a seemingly months old body found in the mountains.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate a movie-goer who was stabbed to death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a despised comic who died onstage, apparently after drinking from a tainted bottle of water.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The trampling death of a trainer by her horse aboard a private jet is investigated by Grissom, Catherine, and Nick. Sara and Warrick look into a Romeo and Juliet scenario in the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Nick investigate the murder of a woman in the press box of a high school stadium.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A professional bank robbery leads to the death of a detective. While investigating the case, Grissom deals with his hearing loss and another CSI gets a personal revelation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two couples meet in a bar and one of the couples is murdered. When a second couple is murdered in a similar fashion the team suspects a pair of serial killers are on the loose.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the lead suspects in Grissom's serial killer case are murdered, Grissom suspects an inside job.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Warrick get the case of an elderly woman found mummified in her closet. Sara and Nick arrive to investigate a breaking and entering to find a raped teen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: During the latest heatwave in Las Vegas, with triple-digit temperatures, Gil and Catherine investigate a baby locked in a car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The team is introduced to the Furry side of Vegas when a man is found dead on the side of the road, dressed in a raccoon suit.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A severed head is shipped to Dr. Robbins from Jackpot, Nevada. Grissom goes to Jackpot to find the rest of the body and gets very little cooperation from the locals.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick's appearance at the preliminary hearing on a rape and murder case goes terribly wrong when the only piece of evidence is thrown out on a technicality.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un sospechoso del pasado de Sara regresa, haciendo que se cuestione su futuro como CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La adicción de Warrick a las pastillas empieza a afectar a su trabajo cuando su investigación sobre la mafia clandestina de Las Vegas le convierte en el principal sospechoso de un asesinato relacionado con la mafia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hodges tiene segundas intenciones cuando escenifica hipotéticos asesinatos en el laboratorio para dar a sus colegas la oportunidad de jugar a ser CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las peleas ilegales de perros para averiguar quién es el responsable de la muerte de una acaudalada dama de la alta sociedad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el rodeo anual de monta de toros de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo luchan contra la gripe cuando el fiscal Klein les pide que investiguen la muerte de varios testigos clave para un caso del gran jurado contra una peligrosa banda de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La inquietante muerte de una niña de 3 años tiene un gran impacto en Catherine mientras busca pistas sobre su asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass y Nick reciben ayuda de una fuente poco probable, un criminal encarcelado (Method Man), cuando investigan dos asesinatos que tienen lugar en el mismo edificio de apartamentos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo descubren varias víctimas que tienen sangre verde, lo que les lleva a la conclusión de que sus muertes están conectadas de algún modo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una noche febril en Las Vegas se salda con un hombre muerto con un traje de alienígena, otro hombre muerto en una bañera, una mujer muerta con dos hombres sospechosos en la escena del crimen y otro hombre muerto con una polaroid de otro hombre muerto.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Las fuertes lluvias en Las Vegas arrastran un cadáver por las alcantarillas. Mientras el equipo investiga, encuentran huesos en el alcantarillado que solo podrían ser de un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una niña es secuestrada en el exterior de una tienda de comestibles, lo que desencadena una alerta Amber.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio Caine chases down a mysterious murder suspect, he discovers that the man's entire life is an elaborate charade.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: After Horatio captures the last prison escapee, their transport plane crash lands, and they discover the fugitive has more planned than a getaway.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and Natalia’s lives hang in the balance as Horatio stands between Natalia and certain death.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs are led into the sexy world of male gigolos when they uncover an unusual murder weapon.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A tornado touches down on a murder scene, damaging the evidence and putting Ryan and Walter in grave danger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team chases a sadistic killer who takes women’s eyes, and a new nemesis challenges Horatio.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio protects a Mexican police chief from the mysterious assassin who killed her husband.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: In a deserted mansion, the CSIs find a body hanging that appears to have been killed by a vampire.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high-stakes poker game is disrupted by a masked assassin, leaving one player dead and the CSIs baffled.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Horatio finds another corpse with missing eyes, everything points to his nemesis, The Taunter – except he has an airtight alibi.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when three convicted murderers are released from prison and someone starts killing them one by one.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When an entire family disappears into thin air, Horatio vows to find them, dead or alive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs expose the seedy underbelly of children’s beauty pageants when a contestant's mom is murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An eccentric genius is assassinated with the most unique weapon the CSIs have ever seen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI deben confiar en un videojuego para obtener su próxima pista sobre dónde atacará un grupo de jóvenes pistoleros.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI tiene dificultades para encontrar al asesino de un infame narcotraficante y Asuntos Internos investiga a un miembro del equipo por drogas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un violador es brutalmente asesinado después de que se expone su identidad. Llaman a Horatio y al equipo de CSI para investigar el asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan a un grupo de artistas de seducción masculinos que buscan conquistas cuando uno de ellos aparece muerto inesperadamente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El Festival Latino de Miami pasa del samba a las tinieblas cuando una pista de baile llena se convierte en el escenario de un pandillero. Horatio y el equipo investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un extraño asesinato del dueño de un club de South Beach resulta ser un guión en el que el arte imita a la vida. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Walter Resden, el criminal archienemigo de Horatio desde hace mucho tiempo, sale a la superficie una vez más y Caine está decidido a finalmente llevarlo ante la justicia.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Alex hace campaña contra un delincuente sexual que se muda a su vecindario y se ve envuelto en una controversia cuando asesinan al hombre poco tiempo después.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Lo que comienza como un caso de aparente violencia al volante lleva al equipo de CSI a la investigación de un collar robado de cuatro millones de dólares, que está vinculado a un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando un supremacista blanco es absuelto por el asesinato de su esposa después de enterarse de que ella es mestiza, depende de Horatio hundir al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una banda de pistoleros enmascarados invade un spa exclusivo, con los lujosos autos de las clientas como botín. Un cliente se hiere en la pelea.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Los cuerpos de dos hombres, ejecutados a tiros, son descubiertos en un hotel abandonado programado para ser demolido. Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una llamada de teléfono celular lleva al equipo a investigar un secuestro que, a menos que lleguen a la víctima antes de que sea demasiado tarde, pronto podría convertirse en un asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Encuentran electrocutada en su bañera durante una fiesta a una joven heredera ultraglamurosa y querida de los medios, y no faltan sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators discovers DNA that contradicts a murder case that was seemingly open and shut before.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators is called in to investigate the very recent murder of an underground hip-hop dancer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a software executive, the CSIs are exposed to the underground world of food splooshing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Las Vegas CSI Ray Langston comes to New York to help Mac and the CSI team try and save a hostage from a human trafficking ring.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators resumes their hunt for the Compass Killer after a body falls from the 59th street bridge.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In the culmination of a multi-episode mystery, the CSI New York team of investigators uncovers the dark lair of the Compass Killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team follows up on a 911 call to a vacant penthouse but finds a nearly 100-Year-Old corpse and a booby-trapped house.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A reformed drug addict is found dead in an alley and the CSI New York team discovers he was the victim of a premeditated plot.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a brutal stabbing, they discover that evidence at the crime scene was planted which pits them against a trusted colleague.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the lingerie league is found murdered in a hot tub, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in Central Park the CSI New York team is lured into the mysterious subculture of vampirism.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a car racing legend dies in a fiery explosion, the CSI New York team of investigators discovers that car tampering is the cause.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When four victims are found dead in a hotel room and the main suspect turns up wielding an ax, the CSIs try to piece together the details.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When two young journalists are found dead on the eve of St. Patrick's Day, the CSIs try to find the clue at the end of the rainbow.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Págale (S5 Ep25)
programme.desc: Al trasladar al hijo de Robert Dunbrook de la cárcel al tribunal, un grupo de secuestradores profesionales embosca a la policía de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Epílogo (S6 Ep 1)
programme.desc: La vida de un miembro del equipo de CSI de Nueva York cambia para siempre de manera significativa después de un tiroteo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Lista negra (Presentando al sepulturero) (S6 Ep 2)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York está rastreando a un asesino cibernético que actualmente amenaza la vida de varios trabajadores de la salud.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El asesino de la soga (S6 Ep 3)
programme.desc: Esta semana, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York está buscando a un asesino en serie que tiene un sentido de orientación increíblemente letal.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Muerte reconocida (S6 Ep 4)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre ADN que contradice un caso de asesinato que antes era aparentemente sencillo.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cicatrices de batalla (S6 Ep 5)
programme.desc: Llaman al equipo de CSI de Nueva York para investigar el reciente asesinato de un bailarín de hip hop clandestino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Me sucedió a mí (S6 Ep 6)
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de un ejecutivo de software, el equipo de CSI se expone al mundo oculto del sexo con alimentos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: A toda marcha (S6 Ep 7)
programme.desc: Un miembro del equipo de CSI de las Vegas, Ray Langston, llega a Nueva York para ayudar a Mac y a su equipo a intentar salvar a un rehén de una red de trata de personas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El nido del Cucú (S6 Ep 8)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York reanuda su búsqueda del Asesino de la Brújula después de que un cuerpo cae del puente de la calle 59.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Solsticio de Manhattan (S6 Ep 9)
programme.desc: En la culminación de un misterio de varios episodios, el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre la oscura guarida del Asesino de la Brújula.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La casa de la muerte (S6 Ep 10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI de Nueva York realiza un seguimiento de una llamada a Emergencias que lo lleva a un ático vacío, pero encuentra un cadáver de casi 100 años y una casa con trampas explosivas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Segundas oportunidades (S6 Ep 11)
programme.desc: Encuentran a un drogadicto rehabilitado muerto en un callejón y el equipo de CSI de Nueva York descubre que él fue víctima de un complot premeditado.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Justicia criminal (S6 Ep 12)
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un brutal apuñalamiento, descubre que se colocaron pruebas en la escena del crimen y eso los enfrenta a un colega de confianza.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Castigo en el juego (S6 Ep 13)
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran a una hermosa mariscal de campo, estrella de la liga femenina, asesinada en un jacuzzi, llaman al equipo de CSI para que descubra quién la quería muerta.

programme.title: El regreso del hombre llamado Caballo
programme.desc: Richard Harris encarna a Lord John Morgan en este excepcional western que sigue de cerca la difícil situación de una tribu de indios sioux, en busca del único hombre que podría llevarlos a la victoria: un hombre llamado Caballo.

programme.title: Los pistoleros
programme.desc: Los hermanos Jiménez y sus aliados lideran operación contra banda de delincuentes que aterroriza la región. Enfrentamientos comienzan a arrojar los primeros saldos mortales, intensificando la lucha por restablecer la paz y el orden en la comunidad.

programme.title: Los resbalosos
programme.desc: En en pueblo ranchero llamado Rio Mojado, llegan dos vaqueros para apostar, robar y enamorar a las mujeres de la localidad.

programme.title: Por ellas, aunque mal paguen
programme.desc: Un aristócrata arruinado casa a su hija con un rico ranchero para no caer en la pobreza, sin saber que este es más astuto que ellos y los pone a trabajar duro en el campo.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: El citadino Ren MacCormack se muda a un pequeño pueblo donde el rock and roll y el baile están prohibidos. Su espíritu rebelde sacude a la población.

programme.title: Seis grados de separación
programme.desc: Haciéndose pasar por el hijo de un famoso actor, un joven desconocido (Will Smith) entra hábilmente en el mundo elitista de los marchantes de arte (Stockard Channing, Donald Sutherland) y pone en marcha algo que cambiará sus vidas para siempre.

programme.title: Fiebre Del Sabado Por La Noche
programme.desc: Protagonizado por John Travolta como Tony Manero, un talentoso bailarín de Brooklyn que busca escapar de su vida rutinaria a través de la música disco y las competiciones de baile, mientras enfrenta conflictos personales y familiares.

programme.title: Sobreviviendo
programme.desc: Son cinco años después y Tony Manero sigue ardiendo. Ahora se pavonea hacia un desafío aún mayor, hacerlo como un bailarín en el escenario de Broadway.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: El citadino Ren MacCormack se muda a un pequeño pueblo donde el rock and roll y el baile están prohibidos. Su espíritu rebelde sacude a la población.

programme.title: Escritores de la libertad
programme.desc: Hilary Swank protagoniza esta emocionante historia sobre chicos de barrio, que han crecido entre disparos y actitudes muy difíciles, y la maestra que les da lo que más necesitan: una voz propia.

programme.title: Prueba de amor
programme.desc: Desde que se conocen en medio del caos de la universidad en Nueva York, Al (Freddie Prinze Jr.) e Imogen (Julia Stiles) comienzan una aventura romántica en la que el amor verdadero a veces compite con la tentación de alejarse del compromiso.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: Todo Corazón

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Tipo duro
programme.desc: Un veterano de Vietnam que se convierte en un héroe local luego de salvar a un hombre de unos atacantes en un autobús, decide tomar acción cuando su mejor amigo es asesinado y la policía demuestra poco interés en resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Dos tipos rudos
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) se une a Bernie Pope (Danny Glover), un viejo y gruñón agorafórico, para patear traseros y limpiar las calles de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Cara o sello
programme.desc: Carlos Mendoza es un policía honesto. Cuando no acepta un soborno y encarcela a los culpables, despierta la ira de un narcotraficante local, que secuestra a su familia y lo hace elegir entre su familia, su carrera y su compañero.

programme.title: El yakuza americano
programme.desc: Viggo Mortensen (Green Book) interpreta a un agente del FBI encubierto que ha ascendido en las filas de la Yakuza y ahora se ve atrapado en una guerra entre la Yakuza, la mafia y el FBI.

programme.title: La última pelea
programme.desc: La última pelea" narra la conmovedora e inspiracional historia de la familia Conlon, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) y Paddy (Nick Nolte), quienes encuentran redención en la arena al luchar para arreglarse a sí mismos y a su familia.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: CAOS
programme.desc: Dos policías, un novato (Phillippe) y un veterano de cabellos grises (Statham), persiguen a un hábil ladrón de bancos (Snipes).

programme.title: El Cuerpo
programme.desc: Un detective busca el cuerpo de una mujer fatal después de que desaparece de la morgue.

programme.title: Acantilado (LAS)
programme.desc: Un hombre viaja desde Londres hasta las Islas Canarias en busca de su hermana menor, quien desapareció después de un suicidio en masa de un culto del que formaba parte.

programme.title: Familia de medianoche
programme.desc: La familia Ochoa opera una ambulancia privada en las áreas más ricas de la Ciudad de México, compitiendo con otros técnicos de emergencias médicas en una industria feroz y éticamente tensa.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: Tod@s caen
programme.desc: Tras su éxito en la taquillera pelicula No Manches Frida 2, Omar Chaparro y Martha Higared llegan a la gran pantalla con la divertidísima comedia romántica TODOS CAEN.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: El ardor
programme.desc: Gael García Bernal protagoniza a un misterioso héroe que emerge de la selva argentina para rescatar a una joven (Alice Braga) y al rancho de su familia, de brutales usurpadores de tierra.

programme.title: Especies III
programme.desc: A medida que su especie se extingue por infecciones y enfermedades, una alienígena seductora inmunológicamente más fuerte se convierte en la única esperanza para que sigan viviendo.

programme.title: Especie mortal II
programme.desc: Un extraterrestre en forma de parásito se incuba en el cuerpo de un astronauta. Justin Lazard, Natasha Henstridge, Marg Helgenberger, Michael Madsen, Mykelti Williamson. Director: Peter Medak.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: Una mujer que es la última en salir de su oficina en la víspera de Navidad debe confiar en su ingenio para sobrevivir cuando está atrapada en un estacionamiento con un guardia de seguridad demente.

programme.title: Dahmer
programme.desc: Jeffrey Dahmer (Jeremy Renner, Zona de miedo) fue vilipendiado cuando las autoridades descubrieron que había asesinado, desmembrado e incluso tratado de consumir los cuerpos de 15 jóvenes en Milwaukee.

programme.title: Perturbados
programme.desc: Gavin Strick (Nick Stahl) le advierte al recién llegado Steve (James Marsden) sobre el Blue Ribbons, un club de estudiantes robóticos y perfectos que dominan la escuela. Cuando Gavin se vuelve perfecto, Steve y Rachel Wagner (Katie Holmes) investigan.

programme.title: Viernes 13
programme.desc: El campamento Lago Crystal ha estado cerrado durante más de 20 años debido a varios feroces asesinatos sin resolver.

programme.title: Viernes 13: parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que había asesinado a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Un par de seductores
programme.desc: Dos estafadores rivales hacen una apuesta: ganará el primero que estafe cincuenta mil dólares a la próxima mujer que conozca, y el otro se irá de la ciudad. Hay mucho en juego en esta comedia divertida, ingeniosa, sucia y podrida.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: El señor mamá
programme.desc: Michael Keaton y Terri Garr protagonizan este clásico en el que interpretan a una pareja que ve alterada su vida cuando Garr se pone a trabajar y Keaton se convierte en quién tiene que lidiar con los niños ¡Y con una lavadora que también se queja!

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II
programme.desc: Justo cuando el australiano excéntrico comienza a acostumbrarse a la vida en la ciudad de Nueva York, Dundee y su hermosa novia (Linda Kozlowski) son blanco de muerte de una pandilla de feroces traficantes de drogas.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee en Los Ángeles
programme.desc: Cocodrilo Dundee regresa en otro divertido episodio de la querida saga de películas. Después de que la novia de Mick, Sue, haya sido asignada a la oficina de L.A. del periódico de su padre, Mick, Sue y su hijo Mickey, se van a Hollywood.

programme.title: The White Buffalo
programme.desc: Charles Bronson and Will Sampson star as Wild Bill Hickok and Chief Crazy Horse in this one-of-a-kind western that finds both western legends braving the snowy wilderness in search of the demon that haunts them both, the fabled White Buffalo!

programme.title: Call Of The Canyon
programme.desc: Gene Autry leads cattlemen in rebellion when a packing company rep cheats them. A gal’s future depends on the company's radio spots for her show! It gets exciting when the owner appears incognito.

programme.title: Beyond The Purple Hills
programme.desc: Gene Autry becomes the new Sheriff after bank robbers kill the former sheriff. When Judge Beaumont is murdered, evidence points to the judge's wild son. Believing the young man, Gene tries to help.

programme.title: Billy Two Hats
programme.desc: Archie (Gregory Peck) and his partner, Billy (Desi Arnaz, Jr.) are bandits by trade, staging daring robberies throughout the American frontier. But when their latest heist takes a deadly turn, they are pursued by a ruthless marshal (Jack Warden).

programme.title: Fort Yuma
programme.desc: When a revered Apache chief is brutally murdered en route to Fort Yuma to negotiate a peace treaty, all-out war erupts in this rousing -- and surprisingly touching -- western starring Peter Graves and directed by the legendary Lesley Selander.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Sam Whiskey
programme.desc: Welcome to America's Wild - and very wacky - West! Burt Reynolds, Clint Walker, Ossie Davis and Angie Dickinson star in this tongue-in-cheek tale of love, lust and larceny as an amiable con-artist is hire by a sexy widow to break into the U.S. Mint.

programme.title: Duel at Diablo
programme.desc: Frontier scout Jess Remsberg leads a wagon train through hostile territory to Fort Conchos. But underneath his valor, he has an ulterior motive: to settle a score with the man he believes killed his wife. James Garner and Sidney Poitier star.

programme.title: Room At The Top
programme.desc: An ambitious young accountant schemes to wed a wealthy factory owner's daughter, despite falling in love with a married older woman.

programme.title: My Friend Irma
programme.desc: A slapsticky saga related by a comparatively bright brunette dishing the dirt about her dumb blonde roommate. Dean Martin and Jerry Lewis's movie debut.

programme.title: My Friend Irma Goes West
programme.desc: Singer Steve, friend Seymour and fiance Jane, along with her dizzy blonde room mate Irma, have a series of misadventures on a California-bound train and end up involved with a gang of murderous gangsters in Las Vegas.

programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: An athletic father tries to press his hypochondriac teenage son to follow in his footsteps.

programme.title: Scared Stiff (1953)
programme.desc: Fleeing from a murder charge, Dean Martin and Jerry Lewis find gangsters and ghosts on a spooky Caribbean island inherited by an heiress.

programme.title: The Caddy
programme.desc: In this zany farce, Harvey is a shy but talented pro golfer who, because he can't face the crowds, coaxes his buddy Joe into a big-time tournament. As Joe's caddy, Harvey is a disaster, and the two have a hilarious quarrel.

programme.title: Artists and Models
programme.desc: A goonish young man receives telepathic top secret information in his nightmares, which are used by his artist friend in comic strips. Foreign agents and the CIA get interested.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Elaine blows a bundle on the Big Apple's hottest hair stylist for the social bash of the year.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Ring the bells! Spread the word! Latka Gravas and Simka Dahblitz are getting married, and the dingy Sunshine Cab Co. garage is transformed into a chapel of beauty for the social event of the cabbies' season.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The unflappable Jim gets an unexpected jolt when a wrecking ball crashes through the wall of his condemned apartment. A disaster ensues when he is forced to move in with Louie.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The drivers bare their souls, recalling those moments in their lives when fate caused them to detour from the street of dreams down the alley to becoming a cabbie.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham sets out in search of stories about Bigfoot, a mythical ape-like creature that has been the focus of many fiction novels, movies and documentaries over the years.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham explores the English countryside to learn about mythical big cats such as the Beast of Bodmin and Beast of Exmoor.

programme.title: The X-Creatures
programme.desc: Chris Packham investigates whether the thylacine, aka Tasmanian tiger or Tasmanian wolf, have truly gone extinct. The species lived in Australia and Tasmania.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Until recently most scientists thought they knew what killed off the dinosaurs. It was a 10 km-wide meteorite which smashed into Yucatan in Mexico.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Iceman: Mummy From the Stone Age
programme.desc: The discovery of a 5,000-year-old male mummy in the Austrian Alps has enabled scientists to re-create a vanished world.

programme.title: Ancient Voices
programme.desc: A dig hopes to excavate the 2000-year-old tomb of Qin Shihuang, China's First Emperor.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Body in the Bog
programme.desc: Veteran archaeologist Ned Kelly and a team of scientists investigate the find of a mummified body in the boglands of Cashel, Ireland.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: Anatomist Professor Alice Roberts and biologist Dr George McGavin go on an extraordinary evolutionary journey to meet our ancient ancestors. They start with our closest prehistoric relative, a Neanderthal.

programme.title: Prehistoric Autopsy
programme.desc: The team go back 1.5 million years to meet one of the earliest humans, Homo erectus. They walked the earth far longer than any other human species and were the first ancestors to look a lot like we do today.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Guardian of Time gives the Doctor a difficult task - and a new assistant.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: On the third moon of Delta Magna, the Doctor and Romana are soon caught up in a conflict.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: With Kroll awake and angry, the Swampies are eager to sacrifice the Doctor.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor arrives in time to save Romana from being sacrificed to the bogus god, Kroll.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Romana are appalled that Thawn intends to fire a rocket at Kroll.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives on a dystopian Pluto where a large company exploits it's workers.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor is taken prisoner by the Gatherer and sent to the Correction Centre.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: Leela has been captured by the Gatherer and is sentenced to death by public steaming.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The rebels turn on the Gatherer while the Doctor confronts the real head of the Company.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives back on Earth but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers the truth behind the village and its robot population.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Kraals intend to invade Earth by stowing away aboard Crayford's rocket as it returns home.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor and Sarah are desperate to warn UNIT of the Kraal's invasion, but nobody will believe them.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A German shepherd and Welsh corgi mix has dog aggression; a blind Lab chases his tail when he is around food.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An aggressive bulldog; a beagle/terrier mix with a fear of trash cans; a Lab mix who starts to exhibit anxiety outside.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A pit bull is aggressive toward strangers; a Rottweiler/Shar-Pei mix must get his aggression under control or be euthanized.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A ridgeback/boxer mix's high energy develops into severe aggression; a couple's whippets bark and lunge at any dog that comes inside the boutique.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps the owner of a grooming business deal with difficult canine clients; a Chihuahua has a barking problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie is overprotective of his owner; a German shepherd is aggressive toward other dogs and people.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help bring peace to Jennifer Lee Pryor's home, where fights have been breaking out among foster dogs and her own four dogs; an aggressive beagle.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Lab-greyhound mix has aggression problems; a Rhodesian Ridgeback-boxer mix has severe dog aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and sees how being on the show changed not only the dogs, but the lives of the owners.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't have the whole team today, and he's got to catch a fugitive with a record of criminal assault. But when Dog finds the fugitive's former girlfriend, she thinks he isn't dangerous at all.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade the head of the Chinese delegation to hire Colbyco. Blake is surprised to learn Lady Ashley is an Acapulco. Amanda has a romantic fling with Prince Michael of Moldavia. Krystle makes a surprise visit to Daniel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda spends the night with Prince Michael and then is heartsick to learn he is engaged. Dex persuades the Chinese delegation to use his company instead of Blake's for an important drilling job. Claudia finally accepts Adam's advances.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Tensions between Krystle and Blake mount as their suspicions of one another grow. Claudia regrets sleeping with Adam. Dominique derails Alexis' attempt to buy out her company but is unable to stop Brady's divorce proceedings.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dominique remains in critical condition after collapsing. Luke pays an unexpected visit to Steven. Blake tells his son that he will support him regardless of his sexual persuasion. Alexis calls her former lover, King Galen, a Middle Eastern monarch.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to persuade King Galen to allow a marriage between Amanda and his son. She sweetens the offer by suggesting his country would receive a portion of Colbyco's revenues. Dominique advises Krystle to reconcile with Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is relieved and Blake is concerned when Amanda suddenly changes her mind and decides to marry Prince Michael. Sammy Jo is revealed to be the culprit behind the compromising photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia flies to Mexico to divorce Steven. Unexpectedly, Adam appears at her hotel and they spend the night together. After Amanda embarrasses Prince Michael at Dominique's party, his patience is exhausted and he leaves her.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake and Daniel survive the plane crash. Jeff charters a helicopter and braves hazardous conditions to finally locate the wreckage. Krystle and Blake finally clear the air and renew their commitment to each other.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle accompanies Daniel to New York for his reunion with Sammy Jo, the child he's never known. While looking through photos Ashley snapped on assignment at a rock concert, Jeff is stunned to spot Fallon among the crowd.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: As Alexis and Amanda emerge from an exclusive bridal salon, a car suddenly screeches to a halt and Amanda is pulled inside. A high-speed chase ensues. As Dex forces the kidnapper's car onto the sidewalk, Amanda breaks free.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex tells a devastated Krystle that Daniel Reece is dead. Steven is outraged when Sammy Jo decides to fight for custody of her son in court. Jeff proposes marriage to Ashley. Sammy Jo learns that her monies will be held in trust with Krystle as executor.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Elena confesses to Amanda that nothing happened in the bedroom with Prince Michael. Sammy Jo fits her roommate Rita with a blonde wig and has her practice duplicating Krystle's voice. Fallon has chosen a new name and heads for Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Those surviving the massacre in Moldavia are separated and held at the palace; Krystle and Alexis are imprisoned in the palace dungeon; Sammy Jo reveals her scheme to Rita; Fallon, suffering from amnesia, reacts to seeing the name Colby.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Past Lives
programme.desc: The body of a wealthy American businessman was found in his rental car. Teeth and bone fragments were the only remains. When the victim's wife files an insurance claim for $7 million, investigators seek the help of a renowned forensic anthropologist.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Several suspects and conflicting evidence complicated a brutal murder investigation. But the forensics were clear on one thing: the killer knew his victim, and that alone gave investigators a head start.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, teenager Tara Munsey went missing after a work shift at a Virginia restaurant. Did she run away, or was she the victim of foul play?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, a human skull retrieved from an Ohio pond reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate that the victim had been stabbed multiple times and that the teeth had been removed with needle-nose pliers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Nevada politician Kathy Augustine died mysteriously during a re-election campaign. The medical examiner could neither isolate the cause of death, nor explain the tiny puncture wounds discovered during the autopsy.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery was found brutally murdered at her Illinois business. Investigators had to determine if this was a robbery gone wrong or a calculated murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A bomb, constructed to cause as much damage as possible, kills a victim with deadly force and flame. When a painstaking search yields some tiny clues, police are able to identify the killer as surely as if he'd signed them.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Chris Ochoa confessed to the 1988 rape and murder of Nancy DePriest, the case was closed. 8 years later, Achim Marino confessed to the same crime. Can DNA evidence identify the real perpetrator?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An aspiring model turned up dead and the prime suspect was her boyfriend. When he was eventually cleared, investigators had to dig deeper to find the perpetrator. With the help of a forensic geologist, they identified the most unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1962, the small town residents of Hanford, California lost their sense of peace when one of their own, 15-year-old Marlene Miller, was murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Doctors cannot pinpoint the source of a businessman's illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On Halloween night 2004, Adriane Insogna and Leslie Mazzara were brutally murdered in their Napa, California home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse is stabbed to death. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, but a bloody fingerprint reveals that he knew his killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: By using techniques she saw on forensic science TV shows, a mother determines who was responsible for the accident that permanently injured her 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Rosemary Anderson is found dead on the side of the road, her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man: serial killer Eric Edgar Cooke.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1994, 19-year-old Shannon Melendi disappeared while at Emory University. Her disappearance remained a mystery for ten years, until new scientific testing cast a different light on Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a popular gym teacher is found dead of what appears to be an accidental gunshot wound, his family is suspicious. A tape recorded by the victim just before his death tells the true story of his strange marriage and his wife's insatiable greed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For years, a woman suffered from what appeared to be the unpleasant side effects of lithium, a drug prescribed to treat bipolar disorder. When she died, investigators had to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide or murder.

programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar invita a la familia a un viaje muy especial para él. Peluzin se pega al plan.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A newly elected, gay councilman's companion and his ousted opponent are suspects in the politician's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A murder victim's mother fatally wounds the prime suspect in the case; then evidence suggests the woman hired her daughter's assailant.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When McCoy and Kincaid disagree, Schiff must decide whether or not to ask for the death penalty in the murder of an undercover drug agent.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a triple murder case ends with the suspect's acquittal, McCoy and Kincaid investigate the judge assigned to the trial.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When Briscoe and Curtis capture a couple after a violent crime spree, the woman claims she was forced to commit the crimes against her will.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and his new partner investigate murder at a college; McCoy risks a lawyer's disbarment to win a case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Kincaid prosecutes a case alone when she is certain that a prominent plastic surgeon who is accused of murdering a prostitute is guilty.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives investigate a kidnapping case involving a woman's claim that her infant vanished from a church while she was in the confessional.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An art teacher's murder leads the detectives to an anti-Semitic student and exposure of a pay-for-grades scandal.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An arson suspect, hoping to make a deal, feeds detectives false information that may lead to the release of a convicted rapist.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Curtis and Briscoe's investigation into the death of a horse leads to a killer who may target more than animals.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the murders of two male teens to a case that occurred five years earlier; McCoy fears he convicted the wrong man for the earlier murders.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A subway-station bombing prompts the squad to seek help from detectives in Baltimore where their prime suspect is wanted.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Paul Robinette returns as a defense attorney representing a crack-addicted black woman accused of kidnapping her son from his adoptive parents.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Walnut Grove's citizens are delighted over a new railroad, then learn many farmers will lose their land.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Isaiah does not find the support of his friends when he falls in love with a 19-year-old blind woman.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A visiting young minister creates suspicion among the men of Walnut Grove when he holds secret meetings.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Dr. Haynes takes on Jenny Wilder as his final patient when an accident leaves her partially paralyzed.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A visit from Sarah Carter's arrogant and demanding father creates havoc with their simple family life.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Isaiah is mistakenly identified as a member of the Younger Brothers gang when he disrupts a robbery that is taking place.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: After Laura wins a writing contest, she meets a publisher who encourages her to put more drama into her stories.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles decides to bring Albert back to Walnut Grove after police arrest him for theft in Chicago.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Charles discovers a morphine addiction is causing Albert's anger.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura holds Dr Baker responsible for her newborn son's sudden, mysterious death. The doctor sees a chance to restore his reputation when little Rose falls ill with smallpox.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Sarah gets angry when Jason spends all of his free time with a wealthy, childless neighbor.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mr. Edwards swears to find a home for a dying man's girl, not knowing she is a baby orangutan.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
